title: Release hesitation, allow bold movement
subtitle: A release-and-allow practice for when fear of the wrong move keeps you from making any move.
excerpt: A short energy statement from the MONEY program. The release targets the freeze pattern; the allow opens to decisive, confident movement around money.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).

practice.whenToUse: Use before a specific money action you've been delaying — before a call, a click, a conversation.

content.text: A short energy statement for when hesitation around a specific action has become a holding pattern. Two statements — one to release the block, one to name the direction.
I am ready to release all hesitation and fear of making the wrong move that keep me from taking action. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow decisive, confident movement around money and opportunity. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.
Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
Drawn from the Week 7 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025). Release/allow structure from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024).
